text: Artificial intelligence is transforming many parts of our lives, from job applications to medical diagnoses. However, this technology also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias. AI systems can learn unfair patterns from biased data, leading to discrimination against certain groups. This makes fairness a key goal—AI should treat all people equally. Privacy is another issue, as AI often collects large amounts of personal information without clear consent. Transparency is also crucial: users need to understand how AI makes decisions. For these reasons, responsible AI development is essential. Developers must design systems that are fair, protect privacy, and are open about their processes.
